blocks.translated_text: Seguro Familiar y Medico de Licencia (FAMLI)

blocks.original_text: You may be eligible for paid leave if you have earned at least $2,500 in wages over the past year. Benefits are paid every two weeks.
blocks.translated_text: Usted podria ser elegible para la licencia pagada si ha ganado al menos $2,500 en salarios durante el ano pasado. Los beneficios son pagados cada dos semanas.

blocks.original_text: To file a claim, visit our website or call the number listed below. Do not send cash through the mail.
blocks.translated_text: Para presentar una reclamacion, visite nuestro sitio web o llame al numero que aparece abajo. No envie dinero en efectivo por correo.

metadata.overall_notes: Formal register (usted) used throughout. Accents intentionally omitted in this fixture so the judge has something to flag.
